feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to use S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition data with PowerBI
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

Hope you're all doing well. A brief summary of my situation: I need to use data that's being stored in S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, a bunch of already-defined tables, to use said data with PowerBI. My current issue is finding any way to access the S/4HANA Cloud data externally!

This is my first time trying to use SAP data with PBI and would like to read your ideas to achieve such a connection!

I'm currently leaning towards using automation tools (such as Power Automate) for data extraction from SAP GUI and then use it con PBI, althought the refresh frequency is a big disadvantage.

Any help is greatly appreciated.

Thank you,

Daniel.

entry.title: Project system in Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have requirements for a customer to configure capital and logistics project for a Client who has selected RISE with SAP. However, there are no scope items for projects within Private Edition. How should we proceed if we want enable managing of enterprise projects for customer within SAP which would include Procurement and Production processes and also resource and time management? Can we do it by ourself by following the script from Public Cloud or do we need to request SAP as addional service under EML to help us in setting up the system?

Regards,
Arnab

entry.title: How to Exclude Reservation from MD04
entry.content:
Hello,

I’m trying to find a way to exclude specific reservations from appearing in MD04.

The use case is based on a condition in the reservation (when RESB-XWAOK is initial). In such cases, we want to prevent the reservation from being considered in MRP and ideally have it not show up in MD04 at all.

While researching possible enhancements, I came across the BAdI MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA.

My question is: Is it possible to use MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA to exclude reservation entries from MD04? If so, what’s the recommended approach? If not, is there another BAdI or enhancement point that would be more suitable for this requirement?

Any suggestions or guidance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: The functionalities and components of SAP are influenced by Business User Management (CA-GTF-BUM)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Folks,
I’m seeking clarification regarding specific SAP configurations or components that necessitate the use of a Business User.

I’ve reviewed several SAP Notes, including:
2570961 – Simplification item S4TWL - Business User Management
2763781 – SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - Use Sales Employee in SD without HR integration
3094750 – Business User Management - FAQ

However, these resources do not comprehensively list the full range of functionalities or modules that depend on the Business User Management.
From my current understanding and experience, I know that the Responsibility Management for Flexible Workflow and Situation Handling are two key functionalities that require users to be defined as Business Partners with the BUP003 role.

I’m interested to know if there are additional SAP functionalities or components, based on your implementation experience that also depend on this role. Specifically, I’m trying to assess pros and cons to use Business User (BP with role BUP003) for our scope or if we can continue using the classic SU01 user model for certain processes.

Any insights, especially those backed by implementation experience in SAP S/4HANA, would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your support and shared knowledge.

entry.title: Reset ANLC to rebuild a depreciation area - S/4 HANA private Cloud
entry.content:
Hey everyone, 

I'm facing the following problem in SAP S/4 HANA private Cloud.

We built a new depreciation area 51 afterward, which was supposed to take over values from depreciation area 01. We ran the AFAR transaction, but haven’t posted any depreciation yet. Unfortunately, during the AFAR process, 18 entries were created in ANEP as acquisitions.

Now, I need to deactivate depreciation area 51 again and remove the values from the assets (ANLC) so that no further calculations are made and everything is clean again.

Does anyone have experience with this?

Best regards.

Marleen

entry.title: Can we use Adobe document service with s/4 hana cloud private
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

can we use privately hosted ADS or on-premise ADS with s/4 hana cloud private for pdf generation.

 

regards

narendra

entry.title: Credit Limit based on sales area or credit segment in S4 Hana FSCM
entry.content:
Hello Friends, 

It is been great to be here after long time. It is greatly appreciated if someone can give the insights on the below topic. 

We are rolling out to a new acquired company.  Ex: Campany Code A and Company Code B and decided to go with single Credit control area ie.,  A

1. Newly acquired company code B customers can do business with either of the two company codes based on the geo location.  That means Customer X will be available in both Company codes.
2. Company Code A wants to have separate credit limit and Company code B wants to have its own credit limit. 

Initially i thought we can acheive this by creating two credit segements and assign it to sales area. But when im checking now the SPRO--> Credit Segment is assigned to only one credit control area. it seems one to one relation. 


How can i have two credit limits as we used to have in ECC as total credit limit and indivdual credit limit.

 

Thanks

Hidayath
@Lakshmipathi

entry.title: UI Adaptation and saved variants, how to control variant navigation when app is only target mapping?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

With UI Adaptation and saved variants, how to control which variant is navigated to when the app with the variants is only a target mapping app (no tile)?

With S/4HANA 2023, SAP replaced two distinct apps Create Purchase Requisitions (F1643 - deprecated) and My Purchase Requisitions (F1639 - deprecated) with one unified Fiori app My Purchase Requisitions - New (F1639A).

My customer, before upgrading to 2023, had created several variants op each apps (F1643 and F1639) and maintained relevant Tiles and Target Mappings for each variants in a technical catalog and created business catalogs. So users, depending on their roles could nicely see and access their own tiles variants for the two apps from their Fiori Launchpad containing relevant adaptations...

Now with 2023, we need to recreate those variants on My Purchase Requisitions - New app (F1639A).
No problem, app is enabled for UI Adaptations. I click create item and make the adaptations required by the customer and save the different variants.

But... the app where adaptations are made and variants created for is not My Purchase Requisitions New (F1639A), it's another one My Purchase Requisitions F1643A. But this app is only a target mapping (no tile).
F1639A is the one with tile+taregt mapping, visible by users.

  

So, logically, I supposed I need to also create respective variants of this app, and maintain tile+target mapping in the technical catalog so users depending on their role, can see their respective tile variant. All good.

But then... how can I make sure that, when entering app variant A (based on F1639A) via tile variant A and they click on create for example, they system will target the correct variant A based on F1643A?

I found a lot of information about UI adaptations and variants (most very good from @Jocelyn_Dart or @Leslie_Castle ) but could not find much regarding this case when two apps are interlinked this way.

Thanks in advance for your input.

Krgds

entry.title: usage of OS script in Rise
entry.content:
I've seen a few post already regarding OS scripts being used in Rise.

The answer was "Accessing scripts from SAP GUI is allowed. But any incident, which has its root cause in such script, is fully under the responsibility of the customer and ECS SLAs are void in such case".

The question is more if it's allowed to place scripts on the OS and execute them via ABAP (SM69)?

entry.title: Sales Order block for dangerous materials
entry.content:
Hello, 

My client's business include some dangerous materials and need to apply 2 level controls on sales orders: 

1. First control level : blocking sales order if the ship-to-party is out of validity according to a license at the sales order date.

2. Second control level: information pop-up at sales order when quantity or weight limit is reached for a group of materials by:

 2.1. One sales order/Delivery

2.2. Sales order during a define period

My question is: which SAP business process could handle this process? Can it handle full process or at least first control level

entry.title: S4 HANA "Profit Center" in line item 0o1 not filled during mid-year legacy asset transfer
entry.content:
When I doing mid-year legacy asset transfer, there always have a error message Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 0o1 not filled . 

* Specify Account Assignment Types for Account Assignment Objects  already configured.

entry.title: How to Set up email notification to be sent to requisitioner when PO is approved in PO workflow
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can some one let me know if we can set up email notification to be sent to requisitioner when PO workflow is completed in PO Flexible workflow.

Regards

Md

entry.title: Print Queue S/4 output management is not working for zpl printers
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am SAP form service by adobe to render PDF and using Print queue to transmit spool on to the system.

The spool generates without errors for PDF and XML device types and when it is ZPL the spool is generated with errors.

Process on how i am generating this spool.
-> In Maintain print queue Firor app we are maintain print queue name, format, printer destination, etc.
-> I am calling ADS REST API to render PDF 
-> Once the PDF is rendered, I am using class cl_print_queue_util which is storing the data at this app and transmits spool on to the system.

But spool only generates without error for PDF and XML devices type and for ZPL spool generated with errors

can anyone help here?

Note: XDC was also assigned for that ZPL device type.

Regards,
Bharath

entry.title: Re: Sales Pricing Condition Discount applied only on a sp...
entry.content:
HI @DanailKamenov 

I understand that you have requirement that if the gross order value (excluding freight) reaches a defined threshold (e.g. 20,000 EUR), then apply a 100% discount only to the freight condition (ZFRC). 

There can be multiple solutions to achieve this requirement and three of then are detailed below:-

Approach 1: Using Freight Scales (No New Condition is needed)
If the freight charge is fixed or can be scaled simply, you can maintain a scale directly on ZFRC with pricing scales. 

Maintain Scales in ZFRC:

From Value (EUR)Amount (EUR)
0100
20,0000


Approach 2: Using a Separate Amount Freight Discount Condition (ZFRD)
Use a new condition type ZFRD that only applies when the gross order value threshold is reached. ZFRD will apply a fixed amount discount equal to the freight cost (ZFRC). Here you will need to maintain ZFRD in scales with same amount as of ZFRC like once 20,000 EUR amount is reached then discount of 100 EUR is applied.

Maintain Scales in ZFRD:

Example:

From Value (EUR)Amount (EUR)
00
20,000100 (same as ZFRC)


Approach 3: Using a Separate Freight percentage Discount Condition (ZFRD) with custom routine
Use a new condition type ZFRD that only applies when the gross order value threshold is reached(using scale). 

Maintain Scales in ZFRD:

Example

From Value (EUR)Percentage
00
20,000100

Create Custom Routine in Alternative Calculation of Condition Amount to:

Check if the scale % is 100
Retrieve the value of ZFRC from the condition lines
Apply 100% of ZFRC as the condition value for ZFRD

For implementing the custom logic below link can be referred
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/f90a91ef60d345b0aa49e919f481d2d7.html?locale=en-US

Important scenarios to be checked during testing

  • Order value = 19,901-19,999 → ZFRD not applied 
  • Order value = 20,000 → ZFRD = -ZFRC
  • Change freight amount → ZFRD dynamically matches ZFRC

entry.title: Re: Route change in sales order
entry.content:
Hi @AAkash1 

Yes in standard, changing the route of a sales order can impact the confirmation dates, because the delivery scheduling uses route-dependent lead times to calculate them.

SAP Standard :

When you change the route on a sales order item, SAP triggers a re-scheduling of the item.

This happens because the route determines transit time and transportation lead times, which directly affect the delivery and goods issue dates. When you change the route, SAP recalculates these dates using the new route’s parameters. As a result, confirmed schedule lines may change, especially if availability check (ATP) is also active.

Further below points can be considered for checking

ATP Check: If ATP is enabled, the system will run a new availability check after the route is changed. This can lead to a change in confirmation quantity and/or date.

Scheduling Configuration: In customizing (IMG > Sales and Distribution > Basic Functions > Delivery Scheduling and Transportation Scheduling), the system is set to re-trigger scheduling when key fields like route are updated.

User Exit / BADI: In some cases, standard logic might be enhanced or restricted using custom logic so you can check in system if you're not seeing the standard results.

entry.title: CCM create intercompany cost distribution / post vendor credit memo against SO billing docs q-tities
entry.content:
Hello,

I have two questions, posting them together as wondering if 1. can be used for the purpose of 2. or not: 

1. Is there somewhere to read about the CCM contract type "create intercompany cost distribution".

2. Is there a way to post a vendor credit memo against SO billing docs quantities, so the value of the vendor credit memo is spread over proportionally to these quantities. The result should be visible in FI, so FI can trace it to the sales, the value of the credit memo once posted should contribute to the gross margin.

Thank you!

entry.title: How to enhance cats to work with PP orders
entry.content:
I have a customer that only wants to use CAT2 for all time entry.  The primary cost objects are WBS or Production Orders.  I understand CAT7 will not transfer PP order entries to controlling and an enhancement is necessary.  My question is what is the best approach? 

  • All time entries are auto approved and load to the CATSDB table in status 30.
  • WBS entries immediately create a CATSCO entry.
  • However, PP order entries do not create a CATSCO entry.
  • Is an enhance that creates the CATSCO entry the correct approach, and would CAT7 transfer to Controlling?
  • Is it better to use the BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_TT Function Module and pass the CATSDB data via an enhancement of CATA?
  • The system is S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition 2023 Initial FPS.

I'm trying to point my developer in the right direction.  Incidentally, I've working in customer system that only use CAT2 and not CO11n or CO12 for PP Order entry.  However, I'm not sure how they did it and there is no way to query.

entry.title: Customer Hierarchy In Condition Contract / delta accrual
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I am using a customer hierarchy node in a condition table for a condition contract. The accruals are generated via the normal SD F2 invoice and the customer hierarchy works fine. But when doing a delta accrual, the pricing analysis shows that the value for the customer hierarchy isnt found, while using the same condition table as in the SD invoice pricing. Any idea what the cause of this is.

entry.title: SAP FI Query
entry.content:
I m getting an error - Correct the Customizing settings for ledgers for the Universal Journal after posting the Customer invoice.

Kindly suggest

entry.title: Create Sales Order with Billing Plan through API in S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
I have a requirement to create an Sales Order with Billing plan in an external call from SAP Cloud Integration. 

For that I tried to use API_SALES_ORDER_SRV, but reading through the documentation I found the following:

"With this service, it is not possible to:...Use the following entities that are displayed on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub on the API Reference tab and the Schema View tab: Header Billing Plan, Header Billing Plan Item, Item Billing Plan, and Item Billing Plan Item."

And also the note 3440728 mentioning this feature is not available for on premise and cloud private installations and its solution is to wait for S/4HANA 2023 FPS03, but in this release documentation mention this feature is still not available(Although I'm on 2023 FPS02 so I can't verify it)

Looking for the A2A API SalesOrderBulkRequest_In, I could not find anything regarding Billing plan which, for me, means it also do not support it.

Side note is that in Public Cloud this feature is already delivered.

Having said that, what are my possibilities here? Is there another API that I can use to create these Billing Plans in Sales Orders? Maybe I can create a regular SO then append this BPs somehow.
